author: Scott E. Detweiler
description: Sane AI writing workflow tool. Workflows live in your vault as Markdown files — edit, share, and run them on any note. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Writers Alembic

name: Writers Alembic

releases.author: sedetweiler
releases.description: A lot of QA to bring the code base up to the standards expected by the new community code reviewer.  No new functionality over previous releases that will be visible to the user.
releases.name: v1.2.0

releases.author: sedetweiler
releases.description: Changes to the manifest due to the use of the word "Obsidian", which apparently is not permitted.  No other changes.
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: sedetweiler
releases.description:
## What's new                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                        
  ### Safety & reliability                                                                                              
  - Fix: "Replace selection" no longer replaces the entire note when nothing is selected                                
  - Empty API responses now show an error instead of silently inserting blank text                                      
  - HTTP requests timeout after 2 minutes; CLI processes after 5 minutes                                                
  - Large context warning (>100KB) before sending to provider                                                           
  - Deleted workflow commands fail gracefully instead of running stale data                                             
                                                                                                                        
  ### Validation                               
  - Unsaved changes warning when navigating away from edits                                                             
  - Workflow save validates name and provider exist                                                                     
  - Malformed workflow files surface an error notice instead of being silently skipped
  - Provider deletion warns about affected workflows and auto-reassigns them                                            
                               
  ### UX improvements                                                                                                   
  - Token insert buttons (+ SELECTION, + CONTEXT) on prompt and system prompt fields
  - Selection-based workflows (Fix My Writing, Tighten, Expand) now receive full note context for better voice matching 
  - Default link depth changed from 0 to 1                                                                              
  - Improved "Replace selection" description explains full-note behavior                                                
  - Added Copywriting and Contextual Prompt to default workflows                                                        
                                               
  ### Code quality                                                                                                      
  - ESLint with TypeScript support
  - 35 tests across 3 test suites              
  - Extracted token constants and shared helpers
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: sedetweiler
releases.description:
- Added linkDepth to expand wikilinks as context                                                                    
  - Created a Contextual Prompt workflow
  - Fixed CLI path handling and folder-exists race condition on load                                                  
  - Fixed token substitution in system prompt

releases.author: sedetweiler
releases.description:
Initial release.

Alembic brings AI writing workflows to Obsidian. Workflows are plain Markdown files in your vault.  Read them, edit them, share them, or submit new workflows via PR.

What's included:

14 built-in workflows (Lint, Fix My Writing, Tighten This Up, Summarize, Ask Claude, and many more)
Support for Claude CLI, Anthropic API, Gemini CLI, Gemini API, Ollama, OpenAI, and OpenRouter
Per-workflow hotkey support
Reset any built-in workflow to its default
Pull new community workflows directly from the repo

Installation: download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below and copy them into .obsidian/plugins/obsidian-alembic/ in your vault.
